biological_replicate: The experiment involved 48 purebred Iberian piglets...
technical_replicate: 12 animals from the Ctrl group were obtained: 6 LBW (3 females and 3 males) and 6 NBW (3 females and 3 males); and 12 animals from the HFD group: 6 LBW (3 females and 3 males) and 6 NBW (3 females and 3 males).

Thus, there were four groups (NBW-F, NBW-M, LBW-F, LBW-M)...
factor_value: The pair comparison between birth weight (NBW vs. LBW), diet (Ctrl vs. HFD)...
